zh.Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Camoys於1283年出生在英國坎布利其爾布時，他的父親John de Camoys37歲，母親Margaret Gatesden30歲。他於1303年6月25日之前與Margaret de Breuse在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1336年6月在英國諾福爾可享年53歲。

zh-hans.Cambridgeshire, England: 英国英格兰坎布利其爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Camoys于1283年出生在英国坎布利其爾布时，他的父亲John de Camoys37岁，母亲Margaret Gatesden30岁。他于1303年6月25日之前与Margaret de Breuse在英国英格兰坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1336年6月在英国諾福爾可享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Camoys was born in 1283, in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, John de Camoys, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Gatesden, was 30. He married Margaret de Breuse before 25 June 1303, in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in June 1336, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Camoys est né en 1283, à Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Camoys, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Gatesden, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Breuse avant 25 juin 1303, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en juin 1336, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Camoys 1283 in Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Camoys 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Gatesden 30. Er hat vor 25. Juni 1303 in Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Breuse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Juni 1336 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Camoys è nato il nel 1283 nel Bourn, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, John de Camoys, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Gatesden, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Breuse prima del 25 giugno 1303, nel Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel giugno 1336, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Camoysが1283年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアボウルンで生まれた時，父John de Camoysは37歳，母Margaret Gatesdenは30歳であった。1303年6月25日以前にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでMargaret de Breuseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1336年6月にイギリスノーフォルクで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Camoys(이)가 1283년 영국 캄브리지실르 부른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Camoys(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Gatesden(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1303년 6월 25일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르에서 Margaret de Breuse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1336년 6월 영국 노르폴크에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Cambridgeshire, England: Caer Grawnt, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Camoys nasceu em 1283, em Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Camoys, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Gatesden, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Breuse antes 25 de junho de 1303, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em junho de 1336, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Camoys родился в 1283 г. в местности бурн, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Camoys было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Gatesden, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Breuse перед 25 июнь 1303 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер июнь 1336 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Camoys nació en 1283, en Bourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Camoys, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margaret Gatesden, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret de Breuse antes de 25 de junio de 1303, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en junio de 1336, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
